title: Race Against Drugs “Harry Leary” Plaque
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A framed RAD plaque dated Saturday, December 16, 1989. Its inscription thanks Harry Leary for working toward a drug-free tomorrow, preserving a public-service dimension of his story.
provenance_summary: Presented as part of the Harry Leary Collection; acquisition detail was not supplied in this source package.
qualifications: The physical plaque reads “RACE AGAINST DRUGS.” The Google Sites caption used “Racers Against Drugs”; both forms are preserved.
The source caption used “Article ID” rather than “Artifact ID.” The archive normalizes the field name while documenting the original typo.
